message:
perf(btree): eliminate Box<[u16]> allocation for cell pointers — use Vec directly

V1.1: StackEntry::cell_pointers was Box<[u16]>, created via
Box::from(cell::read_cell_pointers(...)?) which allocates a Vec<u16>,
then copies it into a Box<[u16]> (second allocation + memcpy).

Now stores Vec<u16> directly — one allocation instead of two, no copy.
The Vec also benefits from capacity reuse when cell_pointers is updated
during insert (line 2901-2904 already used Vec operations).

Savings: ~20-40ns per page load (eliminated Box::from realloc+copy).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
